title: Moonlight Core
description: Moonlight Core is a layer abstraction of Minecraft mod loaders that is aimed to help with multi-loader mod development giving developers utilities for their mods.
body: MoonlightCore is a layer abstraction (kinda) of the mod loaders like "Fabric", "Forge" and (in the future) "NeoForge". This mod is an library that was made to help with multi-loader mods development giving APIs like: * Configuration * Registry * Networking * Attachments * Capabilities * Transfer API
